backend/main.mo: Motoko actor storing events with image blobs, supporting creation and sorted listing by creation time.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to related frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Quick reference summaries describing the purpose of each major frontend file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining the app’s warm color theme and light/dark CSS variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component switching between gallery and event submission views.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: Displays an event card with image, transparent review overlay, and basic event details.
frontend/src/components/events/EventImag: Renders an event’s image blob with loading skeleton and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/events/SubmitEve: Form for submitting events with validation, image upload, and submission handling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Provides global layout with header navigation and footer, wrapping page content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages authenticated or anonymous backend actor instances.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateEvent.ts: Mutation hook to create events by uploading an image blob and calling createEvent.
frontend/src/hooks/useEvents.ts: Query hook fetching events from backend and sorting by newest first.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication state and login/logout flow.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind base styles and custom color/theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/imageUpload.ts: Validates image files and reads them as byte arrays with optional progress reporting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/EventsGalleryPage.tsx: Displays a gallery of events with loading/error states and buttons to submit new events.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitEventPage.tsx: Renders the event submission form inside a styled card layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, features, and requirements for the educational events gallery application.
